title: Crispy Welsh Roast Fritters
description: A crispy twist on traditional Welsh roast fritters, made with a crunchy exterior and a tender interior.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine the cornmeal, roasted vegetables, and roast.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the sunday gravy and 1/4 cup of water.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and stir until a thick batter forms.
Heat about 1/2 inch of oil in a large frying pan over medium-high heat.
Using a 1/4 cup measuring cup, scoop the batter into the oil and flatten slightly.
Fry the fritters for about 4 minutes on each side, or until golden brown and crispy.
Drain the fritters on paper towels and serve hot.
